query:
-- CMD-TEST-002 : Neptune V2 x2 (2600*2=5200) + Volcano x1 (3200*1=3200) = 8400€ sans remise
-- Remise 10% = 840€ → subtotalHT après remise = 7560€
-- Mais actuellement subtotalHT=7800 et discountAmount=780 (10% de 7800)
-- Le vrai subtotalHT AVANT remise doit être 8400 (somme des items sans remise)
-- discountAmount = 8400 * 10% = 840
-- totalHT = 8400 - 840 + 350 (shipping) = 7910
-- totalVAT = 7910 * 20% = 1582
-- totalTTC = 7910 + 1582 = 9492
-- depositAmount = 9492 * 30% = 2847.60
-- balanceAmount = 9492 - 2847.60 = 6644.40

UPDATE orders SET 
  subtotalHT = '8400.00',
  discountAmount = '840.00',
  discountPercent = '10.00',
  totalHT = '7910.00',
  totalVAT = '1582.00',
  totalTTC = '9492.00',
  depositAmount = '2847.60',
  balanceAmount = '6644.40'
WHERE orderNumber = 'CMD-TEST-002';

-- Vérification
SELECT orderNumber, subtotalHT, discountAmount, discountPercent, shippingHT, totalHT, totalVAT, totalTTC, depositAmount, balanceAmount
FROM orders WHERE orderNumber = 'CMD-TEST-002';
